Report.title: Report
Report.description: A forensic report of deleted code from a repository.

repoUrl.description: The URL of the analyzed repository.

purpose.description: The purpose of the deleted code.

reasonDeleted.description: The likely reason the code was deleted.

risk.description: The risk assessment of the deletion.

userId.description: The ID of the user who generated the report.

createdAt.description: The time the report was generated.

/reports/{reportId}.description: Stores forensic reports generated by users.
